ddls:
CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Description of the age group */,
  "age_range_start" INTEGER /* Starting age of the age group */,
  "age_range_end" INTEGER /* Ending age of the age group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional description or notes about the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" TEXT /* The year for which demographic data is collected */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the year is the current year */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data for the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population count for the age group in the given year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or geographical area of the population */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* A score indicating the quality of the data (0-1) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "data_source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "data_source_url" TEXT /* URL or reference to the data source */,
  "last_audit_date" TEXT /* Date of the last audit of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or division the user belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
